config.pre_script:
-- ParadeDB setup: Create table for BM25 search
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS pg_search;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS hn_items CASCADE;

CREATE TABLE hn_items (
    id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
    deleted BOOLEAN,
    type TEXT,
    by TEXT,
    time TIMESTAMPTZ,
    text TEXT,
    dead BOOLEAN,
    parent BIGINT,
    poll BIGINT,
    kids BIGINT[],
    url TEXT,
    score INTEGER,
    title TEXT,
    parts BIGINT[],
    descendants INTEGER
);
config.version: PostgreSQL 18.3 (Debian 18.3-1.pgdg12+1) on aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu, compiled by gcc (Debian 12.2.0-14+deb12u1) 12.2.0, 64-bit

paradedb_multi.name: paradedb_multi
paradedb_multi.query:
SELECT id, title, by, score
     FROM hn_items
     WHERE title ||| $1
     ORDER BY pdb.score(id) DESC
     LIMIT 10

paradedb_single.name: paradedb_single
paradedb_single.query:
SELECT id, title, by, score
     FROM hn_items
     WHERE title ||| $1
     ORDER BY pdb.score(id) DESC
     LIMIT 10

paradedb_three.name: paradedb_three
paradedb_three.query:
SELECT id, title, by, score
     FROM hn_items
     WHERE title ||| $1
     ORDER BY pdb.score(id) DESC
     LIMIT 10

paradedb_two.name: paradedb_two
paradedb_two.query:
SELECT id, title, by, score
     FROM hn_items
     WHERE title ||| $1
     ORDER BY pdb.score(id) DESC
     LIMIT 10
